src/lib/graphql/schema.ts.description: Verified 54 GraphQL resolvers (22 Query, 23 Mutation, 11 Field resolvers) all use Drizzle ORM patterns. Query resolvers use db.select(), mutations use db.insert/update/delete with .returning(). Only intentional static data: subscriptionPlans (config) and health (status check). 5 mutation stubs exist for external services (Stripe, AI generation, background jobs).

src/lib/db/index.ts.description: Database connection verified: Uses Neon serverless + Drizzle ORM with lazy initialization Proxy pattern. Dependencies: @neondatabase/serverless ^1.0.2, drizzle-orm ^0.45.0. Exports db (proxy), getDb(), and schema. isDatabaseConfigured() validates DATABASE_URL.

src/lib/db/schema/.description: 21 Drizzle schema files covering all entity types: brands, brandMentions, audits, content, recommendations, organizations, users, apiIntegrations, geoScoreHistory, recommendationFeedback, and more. Exports from index.ts.
